---
title: "DE4W Capstone Project"
subtitle: "Building a Live Activity Recognition System"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: false
    theme: cosmo
  pdf: default
execute:
  echo: true
---

# Welcome

Welcome to the DE4W Capstone Project.

Throughout this semester you have learned many individual concepts:

- wearable sensors
- data engineering
- feature engineering
- machine learning
- evaluation
- deployment

In this project we connect everything into one complete engineering workflow.

The final system will perform **live activity recognition** using a smartphone.
